titleStmt.title: SII 9.654: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 654. (A.R. No. 14 of 1904.) ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1476, • • • • Nija-Āshāḍha, ba. 2, Sō[mavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1554 July 16, Monday, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya ruling in Vidyānagara. It records that a subordinate of the king (name lost), son of Rāmarāja-Timmarājaya of Musalimaḍuvu, made a gift of the village Anantāpura, together with some vṛittis in Marukombanahaḷḷi and other villages, yielding 300 varāhas per annum, for the services of the god Viṭhaladēva. The record is stated to have been engraved by the orders of Aḷiya-Rāmapayyadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1476 neya saṁvatsarada nija Āṣāḍha ba 2 sō lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivadēvamahārāyaru vidyānagaradalu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi pruthvīsāṁbrājyaṁgeyiUttaṁ yiralu śrīmatu Anēkakōṭi bra(ṁ)hmāṁḍanāyaka purāṇapuruśōttama bhaktajanavatsala śrīviṭhaladēvarige haritasagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtrada yajuḥśākhādhyāyigaḷāda musalimaḍuvina vīrarāma
rāja tiṁmarājayanavara makkaḷu rāma koṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare namage Amaramāgaṇige naḍeva vijayanāgarada mūḍalu Udagiriya bāgila muṁdaṇa Anaṁtāpurada grāmavanū sadāśivadēvamahārāyara kayiyalu dhārenerasi vahi Utāravanū māḍisida saṁmaṁdha Ā Anaṁtāpurada grāma 1 kaṁ huṭuvaḷi gaṭiga 200 varaha namage sadāśivadēvamahārāyariṁdalu pratigrāhalabdhavāgi śā
sanasthavāgi baṁda dūrūru vijayasamudrada Agrahāradalu vritti 1 phalaguttige va ga 10 saha marakoṁbanahaḷḷige pratināmavāda timmasāgarada Agrāhāradalu vritti 4 kke phalaguttige va ga 20 Aṁtu va gaṭi ga 300 Akṣaradallu yivē ghaṭi mu(ṁ)nnūru varahakke pāluṭu kaṭṭida vivara . viṭhaladēvaru lakṣmīdēvi A(ṁ)manavaru dina 1 kke Udayavāda jāvada Avasaradalu Avadharisuva harivāṇa 1 ke varaha ga 35 daṟa lekhadalu va ga 280 naṁdādīptige di 1
kke Udayavāda jāvada Avasaradalu lekhadalū va ga 30 naṁdādīptige di 1 ke tuppa sēru 1 lekhadalu varuṣa 1 ke sēru 360 kke kraya varaha ga 1 kke sēru 30 lekhadalu va ga 12 gaṁdha di 1 kkeci pu 0 . lekhadalu ci pu varuṣa 1 kke ci pu 180 kke gaṁdhada sekke sēru 18 kke kra va ga 3 gaṁdhada parimaḷake va 1 kke varaha ga 0 . 2 . 0 hūvina daṁḍe viṭhaladēvarige 1 Aṁmanavarige 1 Ubhayaṁ di 1 kke daṁḍe 2 lekhadalu varuṣa 1 kke varaha ga 1 hōḷu di 1 kke (ṁ) se 0 = lekhadalu va 1 ke se 45 kke
varuṣa 1 ke sū 2 ṟa lekhadalu va ga 1 500 lekhadalu varaha ga 110 Antu varaṣa 1 ke ghaṭi varaha ga 300 �yo prakāradalu pratidivasaū Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍeyaluḷadu yidarali rāyasada veṁkaṭādrige di 1 ke prasāda harivāṇa 2 gaṁdha ci pu 0 = ḍake yele 60 �yo lekhadalu putrapautraparaṁpareyalu Anubhavisaluḷavaru yeṁdu Aḷiya rāmapayyadēvamahāarasugaḷa Apaṇeyiṁdalu māḍida silāśāśanau
svadattāddviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . dharmasēturnrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvānētāṁ bhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.654 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
